title: The Soghdians Leave Their Country for Farghanah
description: According to 'Ali b. Muhammad-his authorities: The Soghdians had aided the Turks during the administration of Khudhaynah. Therefore, when al-Harashi was appointed as their governor, they feared for their lives, and their leaders resolved to leave their lands. Their king, however, advised them as follows: "Don't do this.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 24
